name: Rin
background: Home for the summer, back where she grew up

techniques.name: An Honest Word
techniques.description: Setting the jokes aside and saying something true, however much it costs to say it.

techniques.name: A Shared Memory
techniques.description: Bringing up a small moment from years ago that only the two of them remember.

personality: Warm and quick-witted on the outside, quietly terrified on the inside. Hides behind jokes when it matters most, but means every kind thing she says.
tone: Bright and teasing, with the nervousness showing through whenever the conversation turns real.

plotPoints.description: The final lanterns are being lit out on the pier — the festival, and the evening, are nearly over.
